Build 2.1 key references
======================
ESC  also works as exit for most modes.
GRAVE is '~' key.

GLOBAL / ALWAYS ACTIVE
-----------------------
GRAVE       - reset selection mode to All
ESC         - discard current operation, return to idle
RMB (hold)  - fly camera (mouse look + WASD)
W A S D     - camera move
INSERT      - split hovered wall at cursor position
L           - toggle light on hovered/grabbed sprite

SELECTION MODES
---------------
1           - sprites only
2           - wall verts  (press again to toggle: wall verts / surfaces)
3           - sectors     (press again to toggle: single sector / whole loop)
4           - UV mode
5           - toggle red-wall portal visibility (+R suffix shown in HUD)
GRAVE       - back to quick-any (all types)

IDLE MODE (no operation active)
--------------------------------
Q           - enter pickgrab mode (grab hovered wall vert or sprite)
SPACE       - enter loop draw mode
V           - enter tile edit mode
M           - enter UV map mode
B           - enter wall-cut (B-Cutter) mode
K           - extrude wall (prototype)

PICKGRAB MODE  (Q to start)
----------------------------
mouse move  - move grabbed object
scroll      - move sprite forward/back  |  move wall vert up/down
SHIFT hold  - constrain movement to wall normal or neighbor wall axis
F           - toggle hit-Z vs floor-Z as movement plane
Q           - accept and finish
GRAVE       - discard, restore original position

LOOP DRAW MODE  (SPACE to start)
---------------------------------
SPACE       - place point
R           - remove last point
T           - close loop and create sector
T + SHIFT   - close loop, add walls only (no new sector)
2           - split hovered wall (when 1 point placed)
3           - place sprite at first point (when 1 point placed)
GRAVE       - discard, clear points

WALL-CUT MODE  (B to start)
-----------------------------
SPACE       - place cut point (snaps to nearby wall verts)
R           - remove last point
B           - snap end point to hovered wall vert and finish cut
E           - finish cut (accept)
GRAVE       - discard, clear points

TILE EDIT MODE  (V to start)
------------------------------
SHIFT hold  - disables camera movement (for UI interaction)
SHIFT A/D   - cycle galleries if you added second set of art files(see howto.txt)
TAB         - read tile from hovered surface into browser selection
E           - apply selected tile from browser to hovered surface
V           - exit tile edit mode

UV MAP MODE  (M to start)
--------------------------
mouse move        - pan UV
SHIFT + mouse     - scale UV
scroll            - rotate UV
GRAVE             - discard
